title: Scimitar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Scimitar''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Scimitar]]''''', the personal vessel of [[Maul|Darth Maul]]
*"'''[[Scimitar 1]]'''", a callsign of a [[TIE/sa bomber]] [[pilot]]
*'''[[Scimitar Squadron (Imperial)|Scimitar Squadron]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[bomber]] [[squadron]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*'''''[[Scimitar/Legends|Scimitar]]''''', the personal vessel of [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]
*[[Scimitar 1/Legends|'''''Scimitar 1''''']], a [[TIE/sa bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] flown by [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] pilot [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Rhymer/Legends|Rhymer]]
*'''''[[Scimitar 2]]''''', a [[TIE/sa bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] flown by Imperial Navy [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jonus/Legends|Jonus]]
*'''[[Scimitar assault bomber]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]]
*'''[[Scimitar assault wing]]''', an Imperial bomber wing also known as the '''White Death'''
*[[Scimitar Squadron (Imperial)/Legends|'''Scimitar Squadron''']], an Imperial bomber wing assigned to [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]]
*[[Scimitar Squadron (New Republic)|'''Scimitar Squadron''']], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[A-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] group
*'''[[Sc'rath]]''', a scimitar weapon used by the [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] people
*'''[[Petranaki scimitar]]''', a melee weapon used by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] people in the [[Petranaki arena]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Scimitar (Begriffsklärung)
}}
